overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a rural village and surrounding farmland at night. The character travels along dirt paths past wooden cottages and windmills under a dark cloudy sky, eventually encountering NPC villagers near a large windmill structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural village outskirts with wooden cottages and fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along dirt path past wooden farmhouses and fences on the left, heading toward open fields

entered.detail: traditional wooden cottage with sloped roof and small windows
simple wooden post fence running alongside the path
unpaved dirt trail winding through the village
tall narrow evergreen tree silhouetted against the sky
large wooden windmill with spinning blades visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark rural village path at night. The camera follows the character past traditional wooden farmhouses and fences on the left, with a tall cypress tree visible on the right. In the distance, the silhouette of a large windmill stands against the cloudy night sky as the character walks steadily forward along the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open farmland with sunflower patches and tall grass

agents.ego_description: walking through open fields with tall grass and sunflowers, approaching the windmills in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of tall sunflowers with yellow blooms visible in the moonlight
dense patch of sunflowers lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the village behind and enters wide open farmland. The path continues through dense vegetation including tall grass and patches of sunflowers on both sides. The windmill grows larger in the center of the frame as the character approaches, transitioning from a distant silhouette to a prominent mid-ground structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: windmill area with stone base structures

events.description: encountering a group of NPC villagers standing near the windmill entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing the large windmill structure, walking past villagers standing near the entrance

notable_agents.action: group of villagers standing near the windmill, one wearing a wide-brimmed hat

entered.detail: stone foundation of the windmill with wooden structure above

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the windmill area, passing close to the large stone and wooden structure on the left. A group of NPC villagers stands near the windmill entrance on the right, observing or conversing. The character continues walking past them along the dirt path, with the windmill blades spinning slowly overhead against the dark night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark rural village that gradually opens into wide farmland and culminates at a large windmill. It begins on a dirt path at night, following the character past traditional wooden farmhouses and fences while the silhouette of a distant windmill looms against a cloudy sky. As the character leaves the village behind, the scene expands into open fields filled with tall grass and patches of sunflowers, causing the windmill to grow from a far-off shape into a prominent mid-ground structure. The camera then closes in on the stone and wooden windmill, passing a group of NPC villagers gathered near the entrance. Finally, the character continues along the trail as the massive blades of the windmill spin slowly overhead against the dark night sky.
